name: Wiipica
text:
Design/Build, Construction, Building Renovation, Drywall,
Painting, Finish Carpentry
Wiipica has partnered with Excell Construction Corporation to provide design/build,
construction, renovation, and finishing services to our Federal customers.
Excell Construction Corp., established in 2015, is a Rhode Island-based MBE general contractor,
providing reliable and quality general construction services. As a result of working with major
corporations, Excell Construction Corp. has gained an in depth knowledge and breadth of
experience of construction management for federal, state and local procurements.
Since its inception, Excell Construction Corp. has successfully completed over 150 projects in
our five year history and every job was performed on time and within budget.
Excell Construction Corp. is capable of self-performing carpentry, painting, drywall, dust/noise
protection, demolition, and project supervision.
